text: Aaj subah jab main sabke liye nashta bana rahi thi, Sasu-maa ne fir taana mara ki unki beti sasural mein kitni acchi tarah sab manage karti hai bina kisi shikayat ke. Meri poori identity is kitchen mein mit chuki hai aur main physically toot chuki hoon, par mujhe bina ruke bacchon ke tiffin pack karne hain. Agar main thak kar baith gayi toh poore joint family ka routine bigad jayega, isliye bas apna farz samajh kar ghisti ja rahi hoon.

Sasu-maa ne aaj fir sabke samne kaha ki mera career chhodna unka ehsaan tha aur unki beti toh working hoke bhi ghar ka saara kaam akele karti hai. Sun kar andar se bilkul khali mehsus hua, par main rone ke liye bhi waqt nahi nikal sakti kyunki mujhe bacchon ki padhai aur dopahar ka khana dekhna hai. Apni bachi-kuchi 'izzat' aur sasural ki shanti banaye rakhne ke liye main ek masheen ki tarah bina ruke kaam karti ja rahi hoon.

Aaj rishtedaron ke samne Sasu-maa ne meri nanad ki tareef karte hue kaha ki usne jaldi pota de diya par main sirf ghar pe ek bojh hoon. Mera dimaag child pressure aur thakan se sunn ho chuka hai, par 'log kya kahenge' ke darr se main bina thake mehmano ki khatir-daari mein lagi hui hoon. Mere paas thakne ya rone ka option hi nahi hai, kyunki ek aadarsh bahu hone ka bojh mujhe lagatar structural endurance par majboor kar raha hai.

Jab Sasu-maa ne aaj pooja ke waqt bola ki unki beti ke sanskar mujhse lakh guna behtar hain, toh mujhe apne maike ki yaad aur apni lost identity ka aur zyada ehsaas hua. Main joint family ki badi zimmedariyon tale itni dab chuki hoon ki mujhe yaad hi nahi main aakhri baar kab theek se soyi thi. Par is ghar ka pahiya mere hi endurance ke bharose chalta hai, isliye mujhe apne aansu pi kar raat ka khana tayar karne mein lagna hi padega.

Shaam ki chai dete waqt Sasu-maa ne phir se comparison kiya ki kundali milane ke baad bhi main unki beti jaisi sarvgun-sampann bahu nahi ban payi. Din bhar ka kaam karke meri kamar toot rahi hai aur career gap ka regret kha raha hai, par mere halat 'cannot afford to stop' wale hain. Mujhe pata hai ki agar main ek pal bhi let gayi toh saara schedule kharab ho jayega, isliye main apni saari takleef daba kar kal ki taiyari mein jut gayi hoon.
